title: Stock market rallies as Fed signals potential rate cuts
content: Major indices surged on Wednesday after Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell indicated that interest rate cuts could be on the horizon. Investors welcomed the dovish stance, with the S&P 500 closing up 1.2%.

title: Bitcoin drops below $60,000 amid regulatory concerns
content: Cryptocurrency prices tumbled as new regulatory proposals from the SEC sparked fears of stricter oversight. Bitcoin fell 8% in 24 hours, while Ethereum lost 6%.

title: Apple reports record quarterly revenue
content: Apple Inc. announced record revenue of $119.6 billion for the quarter, driven by strong iPhone and services growth. The company also raised its dividend.

title: Oil prices hold steady amid OPEC production decision
content: OPEC+ agreed to maintain current production levels. Brent crude traded at $82 per barrel with no significant change.

title: Banking sector faces headwinds from rising loan defaults
content: Major banks reported an increase in loan loss provisions as consumer credit quality deteriorates. Analysts expect further pressure on earnings.
